Talk
Ctrl+R toggle STT  ·  Enter send  ·  Shift+Enter new line

Voice Commands

Punctuation

insert comma
Inserts ,
insert period
Inserts .
insert question mark
Inserts ?
insert exclamation mark
Inserts !
insert tab
Inserts a tab character

Formatting

new paragraph
Ends sentence, starts new paragraph

Navigation

go to start
Moves cursor to beginning
go to end
Moves cursor to end

Control

cancel prompt
Cancel prompt
send prompt
Send prompt

Selection

select all
Selects all text
unselect selection
Collapses selection, keeps text
delete selection
Deletes the selected text

History

undo it
Undoes last action
redo it
Redoes last undone action
Listening...
Listen
Ready...
